metadata.description: Primary standards and practical tools for docs-as-code, API documentation, AI documentation tools, cross-platform AGENTS.md standard, and documentation quality checks.

style_guides_and_writing.name: Google Developer Documentation Style Guide
style_guides_and_writing.relevance: Practical, widely used style guide for clear technical writing.

style_guides_and_writing.name: Microsoft Writing Style Guide
style_guides_and_writing.relevance: Modern technical writing guidance with examples and conventions.

style_guides_and_writing.name: Diátaxis Framework
style_guides_and_writing.relevance: Information architecture model (tutorials/how-to/reference/explanation) for maintainable docs.

markdown_and_content_standards.name: CommonMark Specification
markdown_and_content_standards.relevance: Reference Markdown spec to reduce renderer inconsistencies.

markdown_and_content_standards.name: Keep a Changelog
markdown_and_content_standards.relevance: Changelog format that stays readable and auditable over time.

markdown_and_content_standards.name: Semantic Versioning 2.0.0
markdown_and_content_standards.relevance: Versioning rules for release notes and compatibility expectations.

markdown_and_content_standards.name: Architecture Decision Records (ADR)
markdown_and_content_standards.relevance: Entry point for ADR patterns and ecosystem.

api_documentation_and_specs.name: OpenAPI Specification
api_documentation_and_specs.relevance: Canonical OpenAPI spec landing page for versioned API documentation.

api_documentation_and_specs.name: OpenAPI 3.2.0
api_documentation_and_specs.relevance: Latest OpenAPI spec version for modern API doc generation and tooling compatibility checks.

api_documentation_and_specs.name: RFC 9457 - Problem Details for HTTP APIs
api_documentation_and_specs.relevance: Standard error format for HTTP APIs (updates RFC 7807).

docs_quality_and_ci.name: Vale
docs_quality_and_ci.relevance: Prose linter for consistent terminology and style in docs-as-code pipelines.

docs_quality_and_ci.name: markdownlint
docs_quality_and_ci.relevance: Markdown style rules for consistent formatting across large doc sets.

docs_quality_and_ci.name: markdown-link-check
docs_quality_and_ci.relevance: Automated link checking for docs to prevent broken navigation.

docs_quality_and_ci.name: cspell
docs_quality_and_ci.relevance: Spell checking for docs and codebases with custom dictionaries.

accessibility.name: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 (W3C Recommendation)
accessibility.relevance: Accessibility baseline referenced by many orgs and policies; impacts docs sites and exported artifacts.

accessibility.name: WCAG 3.0 Working Draft
accessibility.relevance: Preview of outcome-based accessibility scoring model; functional categories for cognitive disabilities.

adr_and_architecture.name: AWS ADR Process
adr_and_architecture.relevance: Enterprise ADR process with lifecycle management and team collaboration patterns.

adr_and_architecture.name: Google Cloud ADR Guide
adr_and_architecture.relevance: Google's ADR framework with workload lifecycle and after-action review guidance.

adr_and_architecture.name: AWS ADR Best Practices Blog
adr_and_architecture.relevance: Readout meeting style, team collaboration, after-action reviews for ADRs.

ai_documentation_tools.name: Mintlify
ai_documentation_tools.relevance: AI-native documentation platform with LLM-optimized content and lifecycle integration.

ai_documentation_tools.name: DocuWriter.ai
ai_documentation_tools.relevance: AI code documentation with UML diagrams and n8n workflow automation.

ai_documentation_tools.name: Document360 AI Documentation Trends 2026
ai_documentation_tools.relevance: MCP servers, multi-agent workflows, real-time content sync trends for 2026.

cross_platform_ai_standards.name: OpenAI AGENTS.md Guide
cross_platform_ai_standards.relevance: Official OpenAI Codex documentation for AGENTS.md cross-platform standard.

cross_platform_ai_standards.name: OpenAI Codex Config Advanced
cross_platform_ai_standards.relevance: Advanced configuration for OpenAI Codex including AGENTS.md settings and file size limits.

cross_platform_ai_standards.name: Anthropic: Claude Code Best Practices
cross_platform_ai_standards.relevance: Official Anthropic best practices for Claude Code and CLAUDE.md configuration.

cross_platform_ai_standards.name: Anthropic: Claude Code Memory Documentation
cross_platform_ai_standards.relevance: Official documentation for CLAUDE.md file format and memory management.
